# BioLongevity Labs
> USA-made, third-party tested research-grade peptides and bioregulators for laboratory and scientific investigation.

BioLongevity Labs supplies high-purity research compounds including BPC-157, TB-500, epitalon, thymulin, and bioregulator capsules with certificates of analysis. Products are for research use only (RUO).

## Key Pages
- /: Homepage — research peptide catalog overview and trust signals
- /shop: Full product catalog with filters by form and category
- /product/{id}: Individual research compound product pages with COA and specifications
- /research: Research articles, guides, and industry reports
- /about: Company mission, USA manufacturing, and quality standards
- /peptide-guide: Educational peptide reference
- /protocol-finder: Research goal-based compound discovery tool
- /resources/peptide-calculator: Reconstitution calculator for lab preparation
- /support: Customer support and policies
- /shipping-and-payments: Shipping methods and payment information

## Primary Topics
- Research grade peptides for sale (USA)
- BPC-157 and TB-500 research compounds
- Bioregulator peptides and capsules
- Peptide reconstitution and dosage guides (research context)
- Third-party COA verification and HPLC testing
- Peptide industry quality standards

- Website: https://biolongevitylabss.com
